name: qf_competitor_get
description: Fetch one competitor by id. A participant that can be bet on — fighter, player, or team. One identity per real competitor; aliases stay as links, not duplicate rows.

name: qf_competitor_query
description: List competitor rows with optional filters. A participant that can be bet on — fighter, player, or team. One identity per real competitor; aliases stay as links, not duplicate rows.

offset.description: Rows to skip before returning results.

name: qf_event_get
description: Fetch one event by id. A scheduled real-world contest (UFC bout, tennis match, football game). starts_at is the point-in-time fence for pre-event decisions.

name: qf_event_query
description: List event rows with optional filters. A scheduled real-world contest (UFC bout, tennis match, football game). starts_at is the point-in-time fence for pre-event decisions.

offset.description: Rows to skip before returning results.

name: qf_market_get
description: Fetch one market by id. One bettable proposition on an event. Moneyline, spread, total, and prop are kinds of this single type — never separate object types.

name: qf_market_query
description: List market rows with optional filters. One bettable proposition on an event. Moneyline, spread, total, and prop are kinds of this single type — never separate object types.

offset.description: Rows to skip before returning results.

name: qf_odds_series_get
description: Fetch one odds_series by id. Recorded price history of one market at one book. Pointer object: data_ref points at hashed Parquet quote segments; the Kernel never stores tick rows.

name: qf_odds_series_query
description: List odds_series rows with optional filters. Recorded price history of one market at one book. Pointer object: data_ref points at hashed Parquet quote segments; the Kernel never stores tick rows.

offset.description: Rows to skip before returning results.

name: qf_result_get
description: Fetch one result by id. Settled truth of an event and the grading of its markets. Point-in-time fenced by settled_at.

name: qf_result_query
description: List result rows with optional filters. Settled truth of an event and the grading of its markets. Point-in-time fenced by settled_at.

offset.description: Rows to skip before returning results.

name: qf_hypothesis_get
description: Fetch one hypothesis by id. A falsifiable research claim that roots every lineage chain. Open one before datasets, tickets, or evaluations so work answers a named question.

name: qf_hypothesis_query
description: List hypothesis rows with optional filters. A falsifiable research claim that roots every lineage chain. Open one before datasets, tickets, or evaluations so work answers a named question.

offset.description: Rows to skip before returning results.

name: qf_strategy_get
description: Fetch one strategy by id. A versioned, parameterized betting rule set under test. Identity lives here; the code/rules content lives in a linked artifact.

name: qf_strategy_query
description: List strategy rows with optional filters. A versioned, parameterized betting rule set under test. Identity lives here; the code/rules content lives in a linked artifact.

offset.description: Rows to skip before returning results.

name: qf_ticket_get
description: Fetch one ticket by id. The atomic proposed wager — single or parlay. Strategies emit tickets; backtests grade them; evaluations aggregate them. A one-leg bet is still a ticket.

name: qf_ticket_query
description: List ticket rows with optional filters. The atomic proposed wager — single or parlay. Strategies emit tickets; backtests grade them; evaluations aggregate them. A one-leg bet is still a ticket.

offset.description: Rows to skip before returning results.

name: qf_dataset_get
description: Fetch one dataset by id. A versioned, content-hashed, point-in-time-correct data snapshot. Identical content_hash means identical bytes.

name: qf_dataset_query
description: List dataset rows with optional filters. A versioned, content-hashed, point-in-time-correct data snapshot. Identical content_hash means identical bytes.

offset.description: Rows to skip before returning results.

name: qf_run_get
description: Fetch one run by id. One canonical execution type — ingestion, feature build, backtest, or analysis via kind. Never clone types per pipeline step.

name: qf_run_query
description: List run rows with optional filters. One canonical execution type — ingestion, feature build, backtest, or analysis via kind. Never clone types per pipeline step.

offset.description: Rows to skip before returning results.

name: qf_artifact_get
description: Fetch one artifact by id. An immutable, content-addressed published output (strategy_spec, code, result_set, report, trajectory). Reports are artifacts, not a separate type.

name: qf_artifact_query
description: List artifact rows with optional filters. An immutable, content-addressed published output (strategy_spec, code, result_set, report, trajectory). Reports are artifacts, not a separate type.

offset.description: Rows to skip before returning results.

name: qf_evaluation_get
description: Fetch one evaluation by id. Structured verdict on an artifact/run against a hypothesis. Parlay-aware metrics: per-leg edge and bankroll survival, not raw win rate.

name: qf_evaluation_query
description: List evaluation rows with optional filters. Structured verdict on an artifact/run against a hypothesis. Parlay-aware metrics: per-leg edge and bankroll survival, not raw win rate.

offset.description: Rows to skip before returning results.

name: qf_workspace_get
description: Fetch one workspace by id. One canvas of work — the spatial container for tiles, sessions, and connections in a research project.

name: qf_workspace_query
description: List workspace rows with optional filters. One canvas of work — the spatial container for tiles, sessions, and connections in a research project.

offset.description: Rows to skip before returning results.

name: qf_agent_definition_get
description: Fetch one agent_definition by id. A spawnable agent species (Researcher, Ingestion-Collector, Backtester, Critic) — the template, not a live instance.

name: qf_agent_definition_query
description: List agent_definition rows with optional filters. A spawnable agent species (Researcher, Ingestion-Collector, Backtester, Critic) — the template, not a live instance.

offset.description: Rows to skip before returning results.

name: qf_agent_session_get
description: Fetch one agent_session by id. One durable live agent instance (L1 ledger identity). Operational states only — never actor-internal THINKING/TOOL_CALLING.

name: qf_agent_session_query
description: List agent_session rows with optional filters. One durable live agent instance (L1 ledger identity). Operational states only — never actor-internal THINKING/TOOL_CALLING.

offset.description: Rows to skip before returning results.

name: qf_task_get
description: Fetch one task by id. A unit of assigned work on the canvas, routed to agent sessions via assigned_to / delegates_to links.

name: qf_task_query
description: List task rows with optional filters. A unit of assigned work on the canvas, routed to agent sessions via assigned_to / delegates_to links.

offset.description: Rows to skip before returning results.

name: qf_tool_get
description: Fetch one tool by id. A capability exposed via MCP and generated from this schema — agents call tools; they do not invent ad-hoc side channels.

name: qf_tool_query
description: List tool rows with optional filters. A capability exposed via MCP and generated from this schema — agents call tools; they do not invent ad-hoc side channels.

offset.description: Rows to skip before returning results.

name: qf_execution_environment_get
description: Fetch one execution_environment by id. Where a run executes: local process, local Python sidecar, or disposable Cloudflare sandbox.

name: qf_execution_environment_query
description: List execution_environment rows with optional filters. Where a run executes: local process, local Python sidecar, or disposable Cloudflare sandbox.

offset.description: Rows to skip before returning results.

name: qf_connection_get
description: Fetch one connection by id. A typed cable between tiles on the canvas — projection wiring, never a second truth store.

name: qf_connection_query
description: List connection rows with optional filters. A typed cable between tiles on the canvas — projection wiring, never a second truth store.

offset.description: Rows to skip before returning results.

name: qf_create_hypothesis
description: Open a new research hypothesis with claim, success criteria, and optional sources.

success_criteria.description: How an evaluation would support this claim.

name: qf_register_dataset_version
description: Register a new content-hashed, point-in-time dataset version in the Kernel.

content_hash.description: Hash of the underlying Parquet set.

name: qf_start_run
description: Start a queued run (queued → running). Rejectable if the transition is illegal.

run_id.description: Id of the queued run to start.

name: qf_cancel_run
description: Cancel a running run (running → cancelled).

run_id.description: Id of the running run to cancel.

name: qf_complete_run
description: Mark a running run as succeeded (running → succeeded).

run_id.description: Id of the running run to complete.

name: qf_fail_run
description: Mark a running run as failed (running → failed).

run_id.description: Id of the running run that failed.

name: qf_retry_run
description: Request another attempt after failure/cancellation by creating a new queued run derived_from the prior (terminals do not reopen).

run_id.description: Id of the failed or cancelled run to retry from.

name: qf_close_run
description: Operator close/ack for a terminal run (no status change — succeeded/failed/cancelled are already terminal).

run_id.description: Id of the terminal run to close/ack.

name: qf_grade_ticket
description: Grade a pending ticket to win|loss|push|void after result settlement.

name: qf_start_event
description: Move a scheduled event to live (scheduled → live).

name: qf_settle_event
description: Settle a live event (live → settled).

name: qf_void_event
description: Void a scheduled event that will not be contested (scheduled → void).

name: qf_create_agent_session
description: Create an agent_session by adopting a guest-minted session_id (Kernel never mints). Sets status=starting; put the species name in label until agent_definition arrives.

session_id.description: Guest-minted ACP session id — adopted as the Kernel row id, never re-minted.

anyOf.description: Operator-facing label; v0.1 stores the species name here.

name: qf_start_agent_session
description: Bring a starting agent session into running (starting → running).

session_id.description: Agent session id (guest-minted; adopted, never minted).

name: qf_block_agent_session
description: Block a running agent session (running → blocked).

name: qf_unblock_agent_session
description: Return a blocked agent session to running (blocked → running).

name: qf_cancel_agent_session
description: Cancel a running or blocked agent session (→ cancelled).

name: qf_fail_agent_session
description: Fail a starting, running, or blocked agent session (→ failed). Used for guest crash and boot reconciliation.

name: qf_close_agent_session
description: Close a running, cancelled, or failed agent session (→ closed).

name: qf_publish_artifact
description: Publish an immutable content-addressed artifact (must land before sandbox death).

name: qf_record_evaluation
description: Record a structured evaluation verdict with metrics against a hypothesis lineage.

name: qf_resolve_hypothesis
description: Resolve an open hypothesis to supported|rejected|inconclusive; evaluation-gated at the Kernel.

name: qf_request_approval
description: Request operator approval for a pending context item (L2 gate).

subject_ref.description: Id of the subject awaiting approval.

name: qf_approve
description: Approve a pending approval request.

name: qf_deny
description: Deny a pending approval request.

name: qf_promote_type
description: Promote a schema type from experimental to active (schema governance action).

type_name.description: Object, link, or action name to promote.
